Title: Relates to establishing a community garden grant program for all state university of New York and city university of New York campuses
Summary: Establishes a community garden grant program for all state university of New York and city university of New York campuses.
LawCode: Add §31-k, Ag & Mkts L; amd §237, Ed L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the agriculture and markets law and the education law, in relation to establishing a community garden grant program for all state university of New York and city university of New York campuses
